scripts.originalTitle: 6 hacks to stay insanely consistent with creating
scripts.title: Why Your Content Strategy Is The Problem
scripts.hook: The founders I see building audiences fastest aren't the ones with the best hooks or content pillars.
scripts.script:
The founders I see building audiences fastest aren't the ones with the best hooks or content pillars. They're the ones who just kept showing up when everyone else stopped.

Day 60 to 90 is where it breaks. Most people quit right before the curve.

One rule I stole from the gym: never miss twice. Miss a day, fine. Miss two in a row and you've started a new habit — the habit of not showing up.

Your strategy is not the problem. Your consistency is.
scripts.description: The dirty secret nobody talks about in content creation — it's not your strategy, your hooks, or your content pillars. It's whether you showed up on day 61 when nobody was watching. Here's the one rule that changed everything.
